name: Treegrid
description: A hierarchical data grid where rows can be expanded/collapsed and both rows and individual cells are focusable and interactive.

keyboard_interactions.action: Expands/collapses child rows or performs default cell action
Expands collapsed row; moves to first cell; or moves one cell right
Collapses expanded row; moves to row header; or moves one cell left
Moves one row or cell down
Moves one row or cell up
Moves to first row or first cell in current row
Moves to last row or last cell in current row
Moves to first row or top cell in column
Moves to last row or bottom cell in column

required_attributes.description: true when open; false when closed

optional_attributes.description: Nesting depth (when not inferable from DOM)

notes: Combines the tree and grid patterns — one of the most complex ARIA widgets
Test thoroughly with screen readers before deploying
Consider if a simpler pattern (tree or grid alone) would serve the use case
